series_metadata.series_description: May include spreadsheet and associated workpapers which serve to document reports of suspected internal fraud, general information about reports, investigative information, and/or investigation paperwork. Includes documentation relating to Name Change, Refund/Billing Line Usage, Additional Return Adjustments,Suspense Add, Transfer History, Audit Activity from the personal income and school district tax processing system, Individual Modernization; name change, employee financial transaction documentation from the current business tax processing system; or financial transaction documentation from the legacy business tax processing system.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until Audited by Auditor of State or 2 calendar years from creation. ; Electronic: Retain until Audited by Auditor of State or 2 calendar years from creation., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
